name: total_subscription_count
description: Total subscription count across all dimensions

name: total_acquisition_cancellation
sql: SELECT SUM(acquisition_count) as total_acquisitions, SUM(cancellation_count) as total_cancellations FROM `{table}`

name: subscription_by_date
sql: SELECT report_date, SUM(subscription_count) as total FROM `{table}` GROUP BY report_date ORDER BY report_date

name: subscription_by_masthead
sql: SELECT masthead, SUM(subscription_count) as total FROM `{table}` GROUP BY masthead ORDER BY masthead

name: row_count_and_date_range
description: Total row count and date range coverage
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as row_count, MIN(report_date) as min_date, MAX(report_date) as max_date, COUNT(DISTINCT report_date) as distinct_dates FROM `{table}`
